Thanks for contributing! See CONTRIBUTING.md. Fill in every section.

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR add/change, and why? -->

## Screenshots / recording

<!-- REQUIRED for any UI change (before/after if possible).
     For backend/API changes: note the endpoints/behavior + an example request. N/A otherwise. -->

## How I tested

<!-- Commands run and scenarios checked. -->

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] **Spec updated** — new/changed behavior is reflected in `docs/REQUIREMENTS.md`
      (the Claude review checks PRs against the spec). N/A for docs/chore-only PRs.
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing locally (`make test` + frontend `pnpm vitest run`)
- [ ] `make build` passes (backend + frontend)
- [ ] Conventional Commit messages (hooks pass; no `--no-verify`)
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env*` stay local)
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Claude automated review passes (or deviations justified in a comment)
